definition_cn: 戏曲角色行当,扮演男子,有老生、小生、武生等区别。
definition_en: sheng, male role in traditional Chinese operas, including laosheng (role of an old or middle-aged man), xiaosheng (role of a young man), and wusheng (role of a warrior)

definition_cn: 民间朝山进香或酬神求年成时所组织的集体活动,如香会、迎神赛会等。
definition_en: popular gathering at a temple to worship Buddha or pray for a bumper harvest, e.g. gathering of worshippers, festival to pacify the spirits

definition_cn: 民间一种小规模经济互助组织,入会成员按期平均交款,分期轮流使用。
definition_en: small credit association, where members regularly contribute an equal amount to a common fund and draw from it by turns

definition_cn: 基督教徒对上帝、伊斯兰教徒对真主的称呼。
definition_en: (Christ.) God; Lord; (Islam) Allah

definition_cn: 指胆量或骨气(跟‘有、没有’连用
definition_en: used with 有 yǒu, 没有 méi yǒu

definition_cn: 〈中医Chin. med.〉指人体内气血运行通路的主干。
definition_en: channels; passages for the circulation of blood and vital energy in the human body

definition_cn: 几何学上指一条线移动所构成的图形,有长有宽,没有厚。
definition_en: surface; figure formed by moving a line, having length and breadth, but no thickness

definition_cn: 佛教徒称一切行为、言语、思想为业,分别叫做身业、口业、意业,合称三业,包括善恶两面,一般专指恶业。
definition_en: (Buddhism) karma; deed, speech and ideology, called the three karmas by Buddhists, including both good and evil; gen. evil

definition_cn: 三角形、平行四边形等从底部到顶部(顶点或平行线)的垂直距离。
definition_en: vertical distance between the top and bottom of a triangle or a parallelogram

definition_cn: 数目,九加一后所得。
definition_en: ten; number obtained by adding one to nine;

definition_cn: 最简单的氢氧化合物，化学式H2O。无色、无味、无臭的液体，在标准大气压下，冰点0℃，沸点100℃，4℃时密度最大，比重为1。
definition_en: water H?O; simplest hydroxide in the form of a colourless, odourless, and tasteless liquid, which, under standard atmospheric pressure, freezes at 0℃ and boils at 100℃ and has a maximum density at 4℃ and a specific gravity of 1

definition_cn: 数目,二加一后所得。
definition_en: three; two plus one;

definition_cn: 铁制的响器,挂起来敲,用来报告时间或召集群众。
definition_en: iron bell, used to report time or call an assembly

definition_cn: 时间单位,一昼夜的二十四分之一。
definition_en: hour; period of time; 1/24 of a solar day

definition_cn: 表明物质的有关性质所达到的程度,如硬度、热度、浓度、湿度等。
definition_en: degree of hardness, heat, density, humidity

definition_cn: 计量单位名称。
definition_en: unit of measurement

definition_cn: 哲学上指一定事物保持自己质的数量界限。在这个界限内,量的增减不改变事物的质,超过这个界限,就要引起质变。
definition_en: (philos.) cross-over point (between quantitative and qualitative change)

definition_cn: 说(跟文言‘曰’相当,多见于早期白话
definition_en: equivalent to曰yuē in classical Chinese, oft. found in early vernacular

definition_cn: 相位。
definition_en: phase

definition_cn: 交流电路中的一个组成部分,如三相交流发电机有三个绕组,每个绕组叫做一相。
definition_en: phase; component part of an alternating-current circuit, e.g. a three-phase alternator has three circuits, each of which is known as a phase

definition_cn: 某些国家的官名,相当于中央政府的部长。
definition_en: minister (of the central government of certain countries)

definition_cn: ‘关上’的简称。
definition_en: short form for 关上 guānshàng

definition_cn: 人身最上部或动物最前部长着口、鼻、眼等器官的部分。
definition_en: head; part of the body that contains the eyes, ears, nose, and mouth at the front of the body in animals and on the top of humans;

definition_cn: 指测量东西多少的器物,如斗、升等。
definition_en: ancient Chinese measures or measuring containers, such as dou (a container as well as a unit of dry measure for grain equivalent to one decalitre), sheng (a container as well as a unit of dry measure for grain equivalent to one litre), etc.

definition_cn: 测日影的标杆。
definition_en: pole used as a sundial

definition_cn: 年代地层单位的第三级,小于界,跟系相应的地质年代叫做纪。
definition_en: system; 3rd-level division in chronostratigraphy, lower than erathem, with period being the corresponding geological age

definition_cn: 人体上肢前端能拿东西的部分。
definition_en: hand; the part at the end of a person's arm, used to pick up or keep hold of things

definition_cn: 名词后缀,主要有下面几种作用。
definition_en: [used as a noun suffix, which functions as follows]

definition_cn: 建江,就是闽江,在福建。
definition_en: Jianjiang River, or Minjiang River, in Fujian Province

definition_cn: 用在整数的数词的前边,表示次序,如第一、第十。
definition_en: [used before integers to indicate order, such as 1st, 10th]

definition_cn: 有电荷存在和电荷变化的现象。电是一种很重要的能源,广泛用在生产和生活各方面,如发光、发热、产生动力等。
definition_en: electricity; physical phenomenon arising from the existence and change of electric charge, an important energy source used extensively in production and daily life to provide light, heat, power, etc.

definition_cn: 指君主即位。
definition_en: ascend the throne

definition_cn: 封建时代官吏的级别,共分九品。
definition_en: the nine ranks of officials in feudal times

definition_cn: 摔跤时用腿使绊把对方摔倒。
definition_en: (in wrestling) cause sb. to stumble by a swinging movement of one's leg; trip up

definition_cn: 回禀。
definition_en: report back (to one's superior)

definition_cn: 谢绝(邀请);退掉(预定的酒席等);辞去(伙计、佣工)。
definition_en: decline (an invitation); cancel (a reservation); dismiss (an employee)

definition_cn: 大洋靠近陆地的部分,有的大湖也叫海,如青海、里海。
definition_en: (the parts of the ocean close to the continent) sea; (sometimes) big lake, e.g. the Qinghai Lake, and the Caspian Sea

definition_cn: 数学上表示事物的量的基本概念,如自然数、整数、分数、有理数、无理数、实数、复数等。
definition_en: (math.) number; basic concept identifying or designating the quantity of sth., e.g. natural number, whole number, fraction, rational number, irrational number, real number, complex number, etc.

definition_cn: 一种语法范畴,表示名词或代词所指事物的数量,例如英语名词有单、复两种数。
definition_en: (gram.) number; category of substantival inflection of nouns or pronouns, e.g. singular and plural for nouns in English

definition_cn: 生物学中把具有最基本最显著的共同特征的生物分为若干群,每一群叫一门,如原生动物门、裸子植物门等。门以下为纲。
definition_en: phylum; biological term denoting one of the primary ranks of organisms, consisting of one or more related classes, such as protozoa, gymnospermae, etc. Below the phylum is class.

definition_cn: 压宝时下赌注的位置名称,也用来表示赌博者的位置,有‘天门’、‘青龙’等名目。
definition_en: gambler's position from which stakes are laid, known as ‘heavenly gate’, ‘black dragon’, etc.

definition_cn: 通常指照在物体上,使人能看见物体的那种物质,如太阳光、灯光、月光等。可见光是波长0.77—0.39微米的电磁波。此外还包括看不见的红外光和紫外光。因为光是电磁波的一种,所以也叫光波;在一般情况下光沿直线传播,所以也叫光线。
definition_en: light; electromagnetic radiation that acts upon the retina of the eye, optic nerve, etc., making sight possible; matter that shines over an object, making it visible to the eye, such as sunlight, lamplight, and moonlight. The wavelength of the visible light is a electromagnetic wave 0.77-0.39 micrometres in length. Besides, there are infrared light and ultraviolet light. As light is one of the electromagnetic waves, it is also called light wave. In normal conditions, light is transmitted along a straight line, and is therefore called ray.

definition_cn: 人或动物进饮食的器官,有的也是发声器官的一部分。
definition_en: mouth; human or animal's organ for taking food and uttering sounds;

definition_cn: 戏剧中较小的段落, 每场表演故事的一个片段。
definition_en: scene; small section in one act, portraying a small part of the story

definition_cn: 汉字的笔画，即“竖”。
definition_en: vertical stroke (in Chinese characters); same as 竖1shù ④

definition_cn: 计时的单位,公历1年分为12个月。
definition_en: month; one year being divided into 12 months

definition_cn: 效法。
definition_en: take as an example; imitate; emulate; follow

definition_cn: 生物学中把同一纲的生物按照彼此相似的特征分为几个群叫做目,如鸟纲中有雁形目、鸡形目、鹤形目等,松柏纲中有银杏目、松柏目等。目以下为科。
definition_en: order; classification of a group of related plants or animals ranking above a family and below a class, such as the order Anseriformes, Galliformes, Gruiformes, etc. in the bird class, and the order Ginkgo, Coniferales, etc. in the pine and cypress class

definition_cn: 方根的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for方根 fānggēn

definition_cn: 一元方程的解。
definition_en: (of an algebraic equation) solution

definition_cn: 下象棋时攻击对方的‘将’或‘帅’。
definition_en: (in chess game) attack the opponent's king; check

definition_cn: 围棋用语,成片的白子或黑子中间的空儿,在这个空儿中对手不能下成活棋。
definition_en: trap; go term, meaning empty space in the middle of patches of black or white pieces, where an opponent has no way of manoeuvring

definition_cn: 像霜或雪的颜色,是物体被日光或与日光相似的光线照射,各种波长的光都被反射时呈现的颜色(跟‘黑’相对as opposed to‘black’})。
definition_en: white; colour resulting from the reflection of sunlight or similar rays of all wavelengths on an object without absorbing any of the visible rays; colour of snow or frost

definition_cn: 指地方话。
definition_en: dialect

definition_cn: 哺乳动物,头小,面部长,耳壳直立,颈部有鬣,四肢强健,每肢各有一蹄,善跑,尾生有长毛。是重要的力畜之一,可供拉车、耕地、乘骑等用。皮可制革。
definition_en: horse; large, solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped of the genus Equus, with mane on its nape, good at galloping, with long hair growing on its tail, serving as major draught animal for pulling carts, ploughing and mounting, its hide a material for leather

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Au(aurum)。黄色,质软,延展性强,化学性质稳定。是贵重金属,用来制造货币、装饰品等。
definition_en: aurum (Au); gold; precious metal that is yellow, soft, highly malleable and chemically stable, and used to make coins, jewellery, etc.;

definition_cn: 买卖货物
definition_en: buying and selling; business transaction

definition_cn: 行政区划单位,分直辖市和市。设市的地方都是工商业集中处或政治、文化的中心。
definition_en: municipality; administrative units including ordinary cities and those directly under the jurisdiction of the State Council, which are centres of industry and commerce, or political and cultural centres

definition_cn: 跟地面大致平行的空气流动,是由于气压分布不均匀而产生的。
definition_en: wind; breeze; gale — air current moving roughly parallel to the ground surface, caused by uneven distribution of atmospheric pressure

definition_cn: 旧制长度单位,1步等于5尺。
definition_en: old measure of length, equivalent to five chi

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉收税的关卡,现在只用于地名,如曹家务(在河北),商酒务(在河南)。
definition_en: taxation point [now used only as part of a geographical name, as Caojiawu (in Hebei) and Shangjiuwu (in Henan)]

definition_cn: 几何学上指一个点任意移动所构成的图形,有长,没有宽和厚。分为直线和曲线两种。
definition_en: (geom.) line; path of a moving point, thought of as having length, but no breadth or thickness, whether straight or curved

definition_cn: 数目,十个十。
definition_en: hundred; numeral, product of 10 times 10

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉指祖先的画像。
definition_en: figure or portrait of one's ancestor

definition_cn: 物体内部分子不规则运动放出的一种能。物质燃烧都能产生热。
definition_en: heat; a form of energy released by irregular motion of atoms or molecules in a matter. Any substance can generate heat when burning.

definition_cn: <数目numeral〉十个千。
definition_en: ten thousand

definition_cn: 古代的一种残酷刑法,杀死犯罪者的整个家族,甚至他母亲、妻子等的家族。
definition_en: death penalty in ancient times, imposed on an offender and his whole family, or even the families of his mother, wife, etc.

definition_cn: 中国古代审定乐音高低的标准,把乐音分为六律和六吕,合称十二律。
definition_en: (of classical Chinese music) pitch; tone; 12 pitch-pipes used to determine the temperament of a number

definition_cn: 秤锤。
definition_en: counterpoise; sliding weight of a steelyard

definition_cn: 数目,八加一后所得。
definition_en: nine, one more than eight;

definition_cn: 军队的编制单位,隶属于军或集团军,下辖若干旅或团。
definition_en: division (of an army); establishment for army units subordinate to an army or group army, with several brigades or regiments under its jurisdiction

definition_cn: (毛发)留长;蓄起不剪。
definition_en: let (one's hair) grow long

definition_cn: 容量单位。10升等于1斗,10斗等于1石。
definition_en: dou, unit of dry measure for grain (now about a decalitre, equal to 10 sheng or 1/10 dan)

definition_cn: 圆形的指纹。
definition_en: whorl (of a fingerprint)

definition_cn: 古代盛酒的器具。
definition_en: ancient wine vessel

definition_cn: 二十八宿之一。通称南斗。
definition_en: (usu. called 南斗nándǒu.) dou, one of the 28 constellations into which celestial space was divided in ancient Chinese astronomy

definition_cn: 军队的编制单位,一般隶属于师,下辖若干营。
definition_en: regiment; military unit usu. subordinated to a division, and commanding several battalions

definition_cn: 青少年的政治性组织,如儿童团、青年团等,在中国特指中国共产主义青年团。
definition_en: political organization for teenagers, such as Children's Corps, Youth League, etc.; (esp.) Communist Youth League of China; Youth League

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉某些地区相当于乡一级的政权机关。
definition_en: township state agencies or organs in some areas

definition_cn: 树木的末梢。
definition_en: uppermost point of a tree

definition_cn: 清末陆军编制之一,相当于后来的团。
definition_en: unit of ground forces in the late Qing Dynasty, equivalent to the present-day regiment

definition_cn: 用数字表示的量或数学运算所能得到的每一个结果,如ɑ取值10, b取值8,则代数式ɑb的值为10×8=80。
definition_en: value; particular magnitude, number, or amount, or the result of a mathematical calculation, e.g. if the value of ɑ is 10 and the value of b is 8, then the algebraic expression ɑb stands for the value 80, i.e. 8×10=80

definition_cn: 指未婚的男子。
definition_en: bachelor; unmarried man

definition_cn: 介于大夫和庶民之间的阶层。
definition_en: intelligentsia; social stratum between senior officials and the common people in ancient China

definition_cn: 生物学中把同一科的生物群按照彼此相似的程度再分为不同的群,叫做属,如猫科有猫属、虎属等,禾本科有稻属、小麦属、燕麦属等。属以下为种。
definition_en: genus; category of biological classification into which biological groups of the same family are further divided according to their degree of similarity with each other, e.g. the cat family includes the genus Felis and genus Panthera, etc., and the grass family includes the genus Oryza, genus Triticum, and genus Avena, etc. The category below genus is species.

definition_cn: 用来代替自己或自己的名字,如‘某,张飞是也。’又如姓张的自称‘张某’或‘张某人’。
definition_en: (referring to oneself) ‘Me, my name is Zhang Fei.’ For another example, a person named Zhang may call himself ‘Zhang’ or ‘this Zhang’.

definition_cn: 像丝瓜花或向日葵花的颜色。
definition_en: yellow, like the flowers of towel gourd or sunflower

definition_cn: 出现在太阳或月亮周围的彩色光环,内紫外红。
definition_en: corona; colourful ring of light appearing around the sun or the moon, purple inside and red outside

definition_cn: 底数的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for底数(dǐ shù)

definition_cn: 江河的支流。
definition_en: tributary

definition_cn: 军队的编制单位,连的下一级,班的上一级。
definition_en: platoon; army unit below the company and above the squad

definition_cn: 从物体发出的光线经平面镜、球面镜、透镜、棱镜等反射或折射后所形成的与原物相似的图景。分为实像和虚像。
definition_en: image; optical counterpart of an object produced through reflection or refraction by an optical device (e.g. mirror, spherical mirror, lens or prism, etc.), differentiated between real and virtual images

definition_cn: 刮;削。
definition_en: scrape; peel; skin

definition_cn: 义同‘记’,主要用于‘纪念、纪年、纪元、纪传’等,别的地方多用‘记’。
definition_en: [same as 记jì, chiefly used in 纪念 jìniàn, 纪年 jìnián, 纪元 jìyuán, 纪传 jìzhuàn, etc.; 记 is oft. used in other phrases]

definition_cn: 母亲。
definition_en: ma; mum; mummy; mother

definition_cn: 减法运算中,一个数减去另一个数所得的数。如6-4=2中,2是差。
definition_en: remainder of subtraction, e.g. in the equation 6-4=2, 2 is the difference;

definition_cn: 用漏壶记时,一昼夜共一百刻。
definition_en: ke, unit of time measured by the regulated flow of water through a clepsydra; with a day and night divided into 100 ke

definition_cn: 人或高等动物体内循环系统中的液体组织,暗赤或鲜红色,有腥气,由血浆、血细胞和血小板构成。作用是把养分和激素输送给体内各个组织,收集废物送给排泄器官,调节体温和抵御病菌等。
definition_en: blood; complex fluid circulating in the vascular system of human beings and higher animals, dark red or bright red, smelling of fish, and composed of blood plasma, corpuscles and blood platelets. As a liquid tissue, blood has such functions as transporting nutrition and hormones to all tissues of the body, gathering and delivering waste to the emunctory, adjusting body temperature and withstanding the attack of germs.

definition_cn: 号筒。
definition_en: anything used as a horn

definition_cn: 军队或乐队里所用的西式喇叭。
definition_en: any brass wind instrument used in the army or a band

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Fe(ferrum)。银白色,质硬,延展性强,纯铁磁化和去磁都很快,含杂质的铁在湿空气中容易生锈,是炼钢的主要原料,用途很广。
definition_en: ferrum (Fe); iron; silvery-white, malleable, ductile, metallic element that can be readily magnetized and demagnetized, rusts rapidly in moist or salty air, and is extensively used, esp. as the main raw material in steelmaking

definition_cn: 由于受申斥或责罚次数过多而感觉无所谓。
definition_en: case-hardened; could not care less; no longer care after being repeatedly scolded or punished

definition_cn: 地球表面上被水覆盖的广大地方,约占地球面积的十分之七,分成四个部分,即太平洋、大西洋、印度洋、北冰洋。
definition_en: ocean; vast bodies of salt water that cover seven tenths of the surface of the globe, i.e., the Pacific Ocean, Atlantic Ocean, Indian Ocean, and Arctic Ocean

definition_cn: 称怀孕为‘有喜’。
definition_en: be pregnant; have just conceived

definition_cn: 后辈对前辈自称(用于书信
definition_en: self-depreciatory term for use in correspondence

definition_cn: 人体中管全身知觉、运动和思维、记忆等活动的器官,是神经系统的主要部分,由前脑、中脑和后脑构成。高等动物的脑只有管全身感觉、运动的作用。
definition_en: brain; human organ that is a major part of the nerve system and functions as the coordinat-ing centre of sensation, movement and of intellectual and nervous activity, and consisting of the forebrain, midbrain, and afterbrain. By contrast, the brain of a higher animal functions as the center of sensation and movement only.

definition_cn: 朝代,公元前206—公元220,刘邦所建。
definition_en: Han Dynasty (206 B.C.-A.D. 220), established by Liu Bang;

definition_cn: 元末农民起义领袖陈友谅所建的政权(公元1360—1363)。
definition_en: Han Regime (1360-1363) established by the peasant uprising led by Chen Youliang in the late Yuan Dynasty

definition_cn: 动植物体内所含的液态脂肪或矿产的碳氢化合物的混合液体。通常把固态的动物脂肪也叫油。
definition_en: oil; fat; grease; petroleum; liquid fat contained in animals and plants, or mixed mineral liquids of hydrocarbon compounds. Usually, animal fat in the solid state is also called 油 yóu.

definition_cn: 打磨玉石的石头。
definition_en: grindstone for polishing jade

definition_cn: 振动在介质中的传播过程。波是振动形式的传播,介质质点本身并不随波前进。最常见的有机械波和电磁波。
definition_en: wave, the spread of vibration within medium. The wave is the spread of the vibration itself, whereas the medium particle does not move with the wave. The most common waves are mechanical and electromagnetic waves.

definition_cn: 交游;来往。
definition_en: associate with; make acquaintances with; make friends with

definition_cn: 表示不同意,相当于口语的‘不’。
definition_en: [same as 不 bù in spoken language] no; nay

definition_cn: 中国数学上曾经用过的一种计算工具,形状跟‘筹’相似。清代初期把乘法的九九口诀写在上面以计算乘除和开平方。
definition_en: counting instrument used in ancient China for multiplication, division or extraction of square roots. In the Qing Dynasty, the multiplication tables in rhyme were inscribed on it.

definition_cn: 赶马用的棍子,一端有尖刺,能刺马的身体,使它向前跑。
definition_en: spur; pointed stick used by horsemen to poke a horse's body to urge the animal forward

definition_cn: 电解质电离时所生成的阳离子全部是氢离子的化合物。能跟碱中和生成盐和水,跟某些金属化合生成盐和氢气,水溶液有酸味,可使石蕊试纸变红。如盐酸、硫酸等。
definition_en: acid; chemical compound, such as hydrochloric acid and sulfuric acid, whose positive ions are all hydrogen ions. It neutralizes alkaline to form salt and water, and it combines with certain metals to form salt and hydrogen; in a water solution it has a sour taste, and can cause blue litmus paper to turn red.

definition_cn: 药物。
definition_en: medicine; drug; remedy

definition_cn: 哺乳动物,身体大,趾端有蹄,头上长有一对角,尾巴尖端有长毛。是反刍类动物,力气大,供役使、乳用或乳肉两用,皮、毛、骨等都有用处。中国常见的有黄牛、水牛、牦牛等几种。
definition_en: cattle; ox; cow; large, strong, ruminant mammal with hooves, a pair of horns on its head and long hair at the end of its tail, raised for draught purposes or for its meat and/or milk products, with its skin, hair, bones and other parts being also useful. Breeds usually seen in China include ox, water buffalo and yak.

definition_cn: 把生丝煮熟,使它柔软洁白。
definition_en: softening and whitening raw silk by boiling and scouring

definition_cn: 重量单位,100斤等于1担。
definition_en: dan, unit of weight, 1 dan=100 jin

definition_cn: 中国古代传说中的神异动物,身体长,有鳞,有角,有脚,能走,能飞,能游泳,能兴云降雨。
definition_en: dragon; mythological animal with a long body, scales, horns, wings and feet, which could walk, fly, swim and gather clouds to pour down rain

definition_cn: 宣召。
definition_en: (of a king or an emperor) summon sb. to the imperial court

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉祖父。
definition_en: grandfather

definition_cn: 物质燃烧时产生的混有未完全燃烧的微小颗粒的气体。
definition_en: smoke; vaporous gas made up of small particles of carbonaceous matter in the air, resulting mainly from the incomplete burning of organic material

definition_cn: 写字、绘画、印刷、包装等所用的东西,多用植物纤维制造。
definition_en: paper; substance made from cellulose fibres obtained from rags, wood, etc., oft. with other additives, and formed into flat thin sheets suitable for writing, painting or printing on, or for decorating walls, wrapping, etc.

definition_cn: 盾牌。
definition_en: shield; buckler

definition_cn: 金属元素,符号Ag(argentum)。白色,质软,延展性强,导电、导热性能好,化学性质稳定。用途很广。
definition_en: argentum (Ag); silver; white metallic element that is ductile and very malleable, possesses high electrical and thermal conductivity, and stable chemical properties, and can be used for many purposes;

definition_cn: 佛陀的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for佛陀Fótuó

definition_cn: 胞衣。
definition_en: (human) afterbirth

definition_cn: 圆周的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for圆周yuánzhōu

definition_cn: 中国的本位货币单位,一圆等于十角或一百分。
definition_en: standard Chinese currency unit, with one yuan equal to 10 jiao or 100 fen;

definition_cn: 人的眉毛以上头发以下的部分,也指某些动物头部大致与此相当的部位。
definition_en: forehead; flat part of a human face above the eyebrows and below the hair; similar part of an animal's head;

definition_cn: 特指议会中的席位,表示当选的人数。
definition_en: seats in parliament, indicating number of people elected

definition_cn: 凝结在地面或靠近地面的物体表面上的水珠。是接近地面的空气温度逐渐下降（仍高于0℃）时，使所含水汽达到饱和后形成的。
definition_en: dew; small drops of water condensed on the ground surface or on the surfaces of objects close to the ground surface when the air cools gradually, but remains above 0℃, till the vapour is saturated;

definition_cn: 响器,中空,用铜或铁制成。
definition_en: bell; hollow metallic vessel made of copper or iron, which gives forth a ringing sound when struck

definition_cn: 人或动物体内接近皮的部分的柔韧的物质。某些动物的肉可以吃。
definition_en: flesh; soft tissue of a human or animal body below the skin; flesh of certain animals being edible and known as meat

definition_cn: 矿物,硬玉和软玉的统称,质地细而有光泽,可用来制造装饰品或做雕刻的材料。
definition_en: jade; general name for hard and soft jade; lustrous mineral of fine quality, used for making ornaments or carving

definition_cn: 过多的肥料使植物体枯萎或死亡。
definition_en: damage or injure (a plant) by excessive or improper use of fertilizer

definition_cn: 朝代,约公元前2070—公元前1600,禹(一说启)所建。
definition_en: Xia Dynasty (2070-1600 B.C.), founded by King Yu (or Qi, according to another theory)

definition_cn: 液体或某些固体受热而变成的气体,例如水变成的水蒸气。
definition_en: vapour; steam; such as the vapour phase of water

definition_cn: 遗失。
definition_en: lose

definition_cn: 由于一物的弹性作用使另一物射出去。
definition_en: catapult

definition_cn: 旧时的一种赌具,方形,多用牛角制成,上有指示方向的记号。
definition_en: (in old times) cubic gambling device, made of ox horn, marked with directional signs;

definition_cn: 空气中降落的白色结晶，多为六角形，是气温降低到0℃以下时，空气层中的水蒸气凝结而成的。
definition_en: snow; white crystals falling from the sky, usu. hexagonal, and formed by condensation of vapour in the atmosphere when the temperature drops below 0℃

definition_cn: 悬挂在细线上的能做往复运动的重锤的装置。摆的长度不变且振幅不太大时,运动的周期恒等。
definition_en: pendulum; weight suspended on a string from a fixed point so as to swing freely to and fro under the action of gravity. When the length of the pendulum is fixed and the amplitude of the vibration is not too big, the period of motion is identically equal.

definition_cn: 钟表或精密仪器上用来控制摆动频率的机械装置。
definition_en: device on a timepiece or precision instrument that controls the frequency of sways

definition_cn: 行政区划单位,一般由县一级领导。
definition_en: town; administrative division generally under the jurisdiction of a county

definition_cn: 较大的市集。
definition_en: comparatively large trading centre

definition_cn: 地支的第七位。
definition_en: 7th of the 12 Earthly Branches

definition_cn: 用绳子等结成的环状物。
definition_en: noose; loop

definition_cn: 盛大。
definition_en: grand; magnificent

definition_cn: 秤杆。泛指称重量的器具。
definition_en: graduated arm of a steelyard; weighing apparatus

definition_cn: 乳房。
definition_en: breast

definition_cn: 指由不正当的收入而富裕。
definition_en: get rich by illegal income

definition_cn: 矿床。
definition_en: ore (or mineral) deposit

definition_cn: 中国古代哲学认为存在于宇宙间的一切事物中的两大对立面之一（与阳相对）
definition_en: (in ancient Chinese philosophy) yin; feminine or negative principle; one of the two opposites that exist in all things under the heaven

definition_cn: 中国气象上,天空80%以上被云遮住时叫做阴。泛指空中云层密布,不见阳光或偶见阳光的天气。
definition_en: overcast; (in Chinese meteorology) weather in which dense clouds cover more than 80 per cent of the sky and keep out the sunlight

definition_cn: 大麻、亚麻、苎麻、黄麻、剑麻、蕉麻等植物的统称。
definition_en: hemp (Cannabis sativa); any plants resembling hemp, such as flax, ramie, jute, sisal hemp, abaca, etc.

definition_cn: 麻类植物的纤维,是纺织等工业的重要原料。
definition_en: fibre of hemp, a major textile material

definition_cn: 大腿。
definition_en: thigh;

definition_cn: 说数字时用来代表‘0’。
definition_en: [used in place of ‘0’ when speaking of numbers] zero

definition_cn: 天干的第一位。
definition_en: jia, the 1st of the 10 Heavenly Stems;

definition_cn: 青年女子自称(多见于早期白话
definition_en: oft. in early vernacular

definition_cn: 船。
definition_en: boat; ship

definition_cn: 哺乳动物,毛黄色,有黑色的斑纹。听觉和嗅觉都很敏锐,性凶猛,力气大,夜里出来捕食鸟兽,有时伤害人。
definition_en: tiger (Panthera tigris); carnivorous mammal with a black striped tawny coat, a keen sense of hearing and olfaction, strong and fierce, preying and feeding on birds and animals at night, sometimes molesting humans as well;

definition_cn: 二十八宿之一。
definition_en: wei, one of the 28 constellations into which the celestial sphere was divided in ancient Chinese astronomy (consisting of nine stars in the shape of a hook in Scorpio)

definition_cn: 军队的编制单位,隶属于师,下辖若干团或营。
definition_en: brigade; army unit below the division and in charge of several regiments or battalions

definition_cn: 常绿灌木,叶子长椭圆形,花白色,种子有硬壳。嫩叶加工后就是茶叶。是中国南方最重要的经济作物之一。
definition_en: tea; white-flowered evergreen plant with oval leaves and hard-shell seeds, the tender leaves can be processed to make a beverage; one of the most important cash crops in southern China

definition_cn: 迷信的人所说的人死后的灵魂。
definition_en: supernatural being; ghost; phantom; spirit; apparition; shade; spook

definition_cn: 睡眠时局部大脑皮层还没有完全停止活动而引起的脑中的表象活动。
definition_en: dream; hallucinatory experience that occurs during sleep when part of the cerebral cortex is still in action

definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今山东曲阜一带。
definition_en: State of Lu; one of the warring states into which China was divided during the Eastern Zhou Dynasty (770-256 B.C.), in the Qufu area of present-day Shandong Province

definition_cn: 指和(huó)好面团后,放一会儿,使面团软硬均匀。
definition_en: keep dough till it becomes soft and even

definition_cn: 躯干的一部分,在颈和腹之间。
definition_en: thorax; chest; breast; bosom; part of the trunk between the neck and the abdomen;

definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今河南商丘一带。
definition_en: Song, a state in the Zhou Dynasty, located in the present-day Shangqiu area in Henan Province

definition_cn: 草棉和木棉的统称,通常多指草棉。
definition_en: general name for cotton and kapok

definition_cn: 年代地层单位的最高一级,跟宇相应的地质年代叫做宙。
definition_en: eonothem; the highest division in chronostratigraphy, as corresponding to ‘aeon’, the longest division of geologic time

definition_cn: 江河的支流(多用于河流名),如江山港、常山港(都在浙江)。
definition_en: branch of a river (usu. used in the name of a river), such as 江山港Jiāngshāngǎng and 常山港Chángshāngǎng (both in Zhejiang Province)

definition_cn: 口径在2厘米以上,能发射炮弹的重型射击武器,火力强,射程远。种类很多,有迫击炮、榴弹炮、加农炮、高射炮等。也叫火炮。中国古代的炮最早是用机械发射石头的。火药发明后,改为用火药发射铁弹丸。
definition_en: cannon; artillery piece; heavy-duty firearm with a calibre of 2 cm and above and long firing range, such as mortar, howitzer, cannon and anti-aircraft artillery. The earliest artillery pieces used in ancient China were a kind of mechanism designed to shoot rocks, and it was not until the invention of gun powder that they were used to shell iron pills.

definition_cn: 编辑;辑录。
definition_en: collect; compile; edit

definition_cn: 卡路里的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for卡路里kǎlùlǐ

definition_cn: 抵挡;抵抗。
definition_en: resist; withstand

definition_cn: 动脉和静脉的统称。
definition_en: arteries and veins

definition_cn: 脉搏的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for脉搏màibó

definition_cn: 铺屋顶用的建筑材料,一般用泥土烧成,也有用水泥等材料制成的,形状有拱形的、平的或半个圆筒形的等。
definition_en: tile; vaulted, flat or semi-cylindrical slab of hard material such as baked clay or cement, laid in rows to cover roofs

definition_cn: 长度单位。10寸等于1尺,10尺等于1丈。1市尺合1/3米。
definition_en: traditional Chinese unit of length; one chi comprises 10 cun and one zhang comprises 10 chi; one chi is one third of a metre

definition_cn: 水平方向的长条形承重构件。木结构屋架中专指顺着前后方向架在柱子上的长木。
definition_en: roof beam; long, thick piece of wood used as a horizontal support for a roof in the wood frame of a house;

definition_cn: 长度单位,10尺等于1丈,10丈等于1引。
definition_en: zhang, a unit of length, where 10 chi equals 1 zhang, and 10 zhang equals 1 yin

definition_cn: 打眼儿用的工具,有手摇的、电动的、风动的多种。
definition_en: drill; auger; implement for drilling a hole, including hand-operated, electrically operated or pneumatically operated

definition_cn: 使轴与齿轮、皮带轮等连接并固定在一起的零件,一般是用钢制的长方块,装在被连接的两个机件上预先制成的键槽中。
definition_en: key; a device, usu. a rectangular steel piece, inserted in prefabricated grooves to lock together mechanical parts, such as shafts and gears or belt pulleys

definition_cn: 插门的金属棍子。
definition_en: bolt; metal bar that slides into a socket and is used to fasten doors and gates

definition_cn: 重量单位。旧制1斤等于16两,市制1斤后改10两,合500克。
definition_en: jin; unit of weight, where 1 jin was equal to 16 liang in the past and later changed to be equal to 10 liang; now 1 jin is equal to 500g.

definition_cn: 陷阱。
definition_en: pitfall; trap

definition_cn: 比朱红稍浅的颜色。
definition_en: vermilion; shade of colour slightly lighter than red

definition_cn: 带嚼子的马笼头。
definition_en: bridle

definition_cn: 有机化合物的一类,可分为单糖、双糖和多糖三种,是人体内产生热能的主要物质,如葡萄糖、蔗糖、乳糖、淀粉等。
definition_en: carbohydrate; a kind of organic compound, including monosome, disaccharide and polysaccharide, a major substance derived from glucose, cane sugar, lactose, starch, etc., to produce heat in the human body;

definition_cn: 食糖的统称,包括白糖、红糖、冰糖等。
definition_en: general term for sugar, including white sugar, brown sugar, rock candy, etc.

definition_cn: 镜子(古代用铜制成)。
definition_en: mirror (made of bronze or brass in ancient times)

definition_cn: 西周朝廷上的乐歌,《诗经》中诗篇的一类。
definition_en: ode; court hymns of the Western Zhou Dynasty; one of the genres of verse in The Book of Songs

definition_cn: 躯干的一部分。人的腹在胸的下面,动物的腹在胸的后面。
definition_en: belly; abdomen; part of the trunk. The human abdomen is below the chest and the stomach of an animal is behind its chest.

definition_cn: 气温下降时,在接近地面的空气中,水蒸气凝结成的悬浮的微小水滴。
definition_en: fog; large mass of water vapour condensed to fine particles, at or just above the earth's surface

definition_cn: 泉眼。
definition_en: mouth of a spring

definition_cn: 辅助;教导。
definition_en: teach; instruct

definition_cn: 盛饮食的器具,口大底小,一般是圆形的。
definition_en: bowl; hemispherical vessel with a wide opening and a small bottom, used for holding food

definition_cn: 生物学中把同一门的生物按照彼此相似的特征和亲缘关系再分为若干群,每一群叫一纲,如苔藓植物门分为苔纲和藓纲,脊椎动物亚门分为鱼、鸟、哺乳等纲。纲以下为目。
definition_en: (biol.) class; major category in biological taxonomy, e.g. the class of mammals

definition_cn: 恐吓;恫吓。
definition_en: threaten; intimidate

definition_cn: 〈中医Chin. med.〉指稀痰。
definition_en: thin phlegm

definition_cn: 哺乳动物,面部略圆,躯干长,耳壳短小,眼大,瞳孔随光线强弱而缩小放大,四肢较短,掌部有肉质的垫,行动敏捷,善跳跃,能捕鼠,毛柔软,有黑、白、黄、灰褐等色。
definition_en: cat (Felis catus); mammal with a round face, small ears, large eyes whose pupils enlarge or contract according to the intensity of light, short limbs, padded paws, and a long body with soft fur that may be black, white, yellow or greyish-brown in colour, agile, adept at leaping, and able to catch rats

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,生在浅水中,地下茎肥大而长,有节,叶子圆形,高出水面,花大,淡红色或白色,有香味。地下茎叫藕,种子叫莲子,都可以吃。
definition_en: lotus (Nelumbo nucifera); perennial herbal plant growing in shallow water, having fleshy and knotted subterranean stems (roots), orbicular leaves above water, and pink or white fragrant flowers, both the stems and seeds being edible;

definition_cn: 祝人寿辰。
definition_en: congratulate sb. on his or her birthday

definition_cn: 昆虫,种类很多,有毒刺,能蜇人,常成群住在一起。
definition_en: any hymenopterous insect of the superfamily Apoidea, with a poisonous sting, usu. living in groups

definition_cn: 某些具有黏性的物质,用动物的皮、角等熬成或由植物分泌出来,也有人工合成的。通常用来黏合器物,如鳔胶、桃胶、万能胶,有的供食用或入药,如果胶、阿胶。
definition_en: glue; gum; mucus; gelatin; adhesive substance obtained by boiling animal hide or horns, etc., also secreted by plants or made synthetically, e.g. isinglass, peach gum, all-purpose adhesive, usu. used to stick objects together, some being edible and used in medicine, e.g. pectin and donkey-hide gelatin

definition_cn: 舌头。
definition_en: tongue

definition_cn: 脂肪少;肉少(跟‘胖’或‘肥’相对as opposed to‘fat’})。
definition_en: thin; emaciated

definition_cn: 古代在农历十二月里合祭众神叫做腊,因此农历十二月叫腊月。
definition_en: layue, the 12th lunar month,腊là being the ceremony held in this month at which people in ancient times offered sacrifices to the gods, hence the name of the month

definition_cn: 周朝国名,在今山西、河北南部及陕西中部、河南西北部。
definition_en: Jin, a state of the Zhou Dynasty, occupying parts of what are now Shanxi, southern Hebei, central Shaanxi and northwestern Henan

definition_cn: 朝代,公元265—420,司马炎所建。
definition_en: Jin Dynasty (265-420), founded by Sima Yan

definition_cn: 后晋。
definition_en: Later Jin Dynasty

definition_cn: 山西的别称。
definition_en: another name for Shanxi Province

definition_cn: 姓。
definition_en: a surname

definition_cn: 古代兵器,长约二三尺的细杆装上尖头,杆的末梢附有羽毛,搭在弓弩上发射。现代射箭运动用的箭一般用钢、铝合金、塑料等制成。
definition_en: arrow; ancient weapon mounted on a slender shaft two- to three-chi-long, pointed at one end and feathered at the other, for shooting from a bow. Arrows used in modern archery are usu. made of steel, aluminium alloy, plastic, etc.

definition_cn: 电解质电离时所生成的阴离子全部是氢氧根离子的化合物。能跟酸中和生成盐和水,水溶液有涩味,可使石蕊试纸变蓝。如氢氧化钠、氢氧化钾等。
definition_en: alkali; chemical compound produced when all the negative ions derived from the ionization of an electrolyte are ions with hydroxide radicals, capable of being neutralized with acid to produce salt and water, its aqueous solution being puckery and able to turn the litmus paper blue, such as sodium hydroxide and potassium hydroxide

definition_cn: 含有10个分子结晶水的碳酸钠,无色晶体,用作洗涤剂,也用来中和发面中的酸味。
definition_en: soda; sodium carbonate with 10-molecule crystal water, a colourless crystal, used as detergent or to neutralize the acidity of fermented dough

definition_cn: 安在门、箱子、抽屉等的开合处或铁链的环孔中,使人不能随便打开的金属器具,一般要用钥匙才能开。
definition_en: lock; padlock; metal implement attached to a door, case, drawer, or links of a chain to prevent their being opened by unauthorized people, usu. unlocked with a key

definition_cn: 剪刀。
definition_en: scissors; shears; clippers

definition_cn: 便利人上下的用具或设备,常见的是梯子、楼梯。
definition_en: ladder; steps; stairs; framework consisting of two parallel sidepieces connected by a series of rungs or crosspieces, enabling a person to climb up or down

definition_cn: 人或动物体内,由肾脏产生,从尿道排泄出来的液体。
definition_en: urine; liquid produced in the kidneys and discharged through the urethra in the bodies of humans or animals

definition_cn: 鸟类的飞行器官,由前肢演化而成,上面生有羽毛。有的鸟翼退化,不能飞翔。
definition_en: wing; each of the feathered appendages, evolved from forelimbs, by means of which a bird is able to fly. Some birds, with degenerated wings, cannot fly.

definition_cn: 飞机或滑翔机等飞行工具两侧伸出像鸟翼的部分,有支撑机身、产生升力等作用。
definition_en: wings of an aircraft (e.g. airplane, glider, etc.); airfoils that extend like a bird's wings, and function to support aircraft and generate forces for take-off, etc.

definition_cn: 二十八宿之一。
definition_en: yi, one of the 28 constellations into which the celestial sphere was divided in ancient Chinese astronomy

definition_cn: 母亲。
definition_en: mom; mummy; mother

definition_cn: 鞭子。
definition_en: whip; lash

definition_cn: 昆虫的飞行器官,一般是两对,呈膜状,上面有翅脉,有的前翅变成角质或革质。通常又指鸟类等动物的飞行器官。
definition_en: wing; one of the pair of thin, lateral extensions on the body of an insect which enable it to fly; the fore wings of some insects have turned into cutin; also the wings of birds;

definition_cn: 翅果向外伸出呈翅状的果皮。
definition_en: outstretched wing-like peel of a samara

definition_cn: 君主时代帝王、贵族、大臣等死后,依其生前事迹所给予的称号。例如齐宣王的‘宣’,楚庄王的‘庄’;诸葛亮谥‘忠武’,岳飞谥‘武穆’。
definition_en: posthumous title (formerly bestowed on a ruler, a nobleman, or an eminent official) as apposite to the life and moral qualities of the deceased, such as xuan for Duke Xuan of Qi, zhuang for Duke Zhuang of Chu, zhongwu (loyal and valiant) for Zhuge Liang, and wumu (valiant and solemn) for Yue Fei

definition_en: paper mulberry (Broussonetia papyrifera); deciduous, dioecious tree that has oval leaves, bristly hair on the leaves and stems, and pale-green blossoms. The bark can be used to produce mulberry paper and xuan paper.
